steps: Initial ratio red:blue:yellow = 5:3:2, total parts = 10. Total paint = 600 ml. So each part = 600/10 = 60 ml. Red = 5*60 = 300 ml, Blue = 3*60 = 180 ml, Yellow = 2*60 = 120 ml. After adding blue, red unchanged = 300 ml, yellow unchanged = 120 ml. New ratio red:blue = 1:1, so new blue must equal red = 300 ml. Original blue = 180 ml, so extra blue added = 300 - 180 = 120 ml. New total paint = original 600 ml + extra blue 120 ml = 720 ml.
